name: runtime-gateway-dynamic-action-catalog
title: RuntimeGateway dynamic action catalog 收束
description: 实现 design backlog Slice 2 / D7：让 RuntimeGateway surface_for_actor 纳入 dynamic extension actions，extension dynamic provider 产出 concrete action descriptors，catalog 与 invoke 复用同一 resolver，并移除 actor-visible marker action。
